  "findings": [
    "Caliper guide pins are dry and seized, preventing proper floating caliper movement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Disassemble the caliper slide pins, clean or replace the pins and brackets, apply OEM-specified silicone-based brake grease, and reassemble."
  ],
  "rationale": "Dry or seized caliper guide pins prevent the caliper from sliding freely, which leads to uneven brake pad wear, reduced braking efficiency, and potential brake drag or overheating. This violates standard OEM assembly specifications and FMVSS-adjacent shop practices for brake system integrity.",

    "OEM Brake Assembly Specifications",
    "FMVSS 135 (Light Vehicle Brake Systems) adjacent shop practices"
  ]
